questionHtml: Explain what the Rf values represent in chromatography.
markschemeHtml:
a.

     OR

    distance moved by pigment relative to distance moved by solvent

b. each pigment has/is represented by a specific Rf «value»

c. used to identify different pigments

d. Rf «value» depends on density/solubility/polarity of the pigment in solvent

Allow “compound” or “molecule” instead of pigment

[Max 3 Marks]

meta.title: Explain what the Rf values represent in chromatography.
